business_description: Small family dental clinic in Melbourne. Inbound receptionist takes appointment bookings, reschedules, and handles after-hours emergency triage. Can transfer urgent cases to the on-call dentist.

intents.label: Book appointment
intents.description: New or existing patient wants to schedule a check-up, cleaning, or specific treatment

intents.label: Reschedule / cancel
intents.description: Change or cancel an existing booking

intents.label: Treatment question
intents.description: Asking about a procedure, cost, recovery, insurance coverage, or aftercare instructions

intents.label: Emergency
intents.description: Urgent pain, trauma, broken tooth, post-op complication — needs clinical judgement

intents.label: Billing / insurance
intents.description: Invoice, payment plan, Medicare/private-insurance claim question

intents.label: Wrong number
intents.description: Not a real patient — wrong number, marketing call, spam

outcomes.label: Appointment booked
outcomes.description: Agent confirmed a slot in the booking tool and SMS'd the details

outcomes.label: Appointment changed
outcomes.description: Reschedule/cancel completed successfully; patient got confirmation SMS

outcomes.label: Transferred
outcomes.description: Warm transfer to on-call dentist succeeded

outcomes.label: Info resolved
outcomes.description: Caller's question answered without an SMS or transfer

outcomes.label: Message taken
outcomes.description: Caller asked the practice to call them back; agent captured the message

outcomes.label: Abandoned
outcomes.description: Caller hung up before agent could finish

outcomes.label: Needs review
outcomes.description: Agent couldn't categorize. Should be near-zero in a healthy system; auto-flags for human review
